benchmark.tooltip: This benchmark represents an indicative average based on European automotive retail network observations. It is not statistically validated. For brand-specific benchmarks, contact your OEM program manager.
benchmark.footnote: * Benchmark is indicative. Segmented benchmarks by brand tier and market type available in enterprise configuration.
